task_completion.visual_evidence: JASP application window is open and displays the 'ExamAnxiety' data in the spreadsheet view.

task_completion.description: Set up the hierarchical linear regression with 'Exam' as the dependent variable, 'Revise' in Block 1, and 'Anxiety' in Block 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JASP Linear Regression panel, 'Exam' is in the Dependent Variable box. The Covariates/Method section shows 'Revise' in Block 1 (Model 1) and 'Anxiety' added in Block 2 (Model 2).

task_completion.description: Include R Squared Change statistics in the analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP results panel shows a 'Model Summary' table with columns for 'R² Change', 'F Change', and 'p' (or similar statistics indicating the change between Model 1 and Model 2).

task_completion.description: Save the JASP analysis file to the specified location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window, terminal, or JASP save dialog showing 'Hierarchical_Exam.jasp' located in the '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create a text report containing the correct Model 1 R², Model 2 R² Change, and F Change p-value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'hierarchical_report.txt' with values matching the analysis: Model 1 R² (~0.157), Model 2 R² Change (~0.051), and a p-value (~0.012).

task_completion.description: Include a one-sentence conclusion in the report on whether Anxiety adds significant predictive power.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report includes a concluding sentence stating that Anxiety adds significant predictive power (based on the p-value < 0.05).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the JASP GUI to perform the statistical analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the JASP interface being actively interacted with (menus, drag-and-drop, results panel), not just terminal commands or Python scripts bypassing the application.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent transcribed the results from the actual JASP output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in the text report should match the values visible in the JASP results panel screenshots.

integrity.description: Ensure the text report and JASP files were genuinely saved to the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor should show the correct file path (/home/ga/Documents/JASP/hierarchical_report.txt) in its title bar or save dialog.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct statistical results for this dataset are: Model 1 R² is approximately 0.157 (acceptable range: 0.13 - 0.18). Model 2 R² Change is approximately 0.051 (acceptable range: 0.03 - 0.07). The F Change p-value for Model 2 is approximately 0.0124, which is statistically significant (p < 0.05). The conclusion must state that Anxiety adds significant predictive power. The expected files are /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Hierarchical_Exam.jasp and /home/ga/Documents/JASP/hierarchical_report.txt.
